sourcesContent:
<template>
  <el-table
      :data="tableData"
      style="width: 100%">
    <el-table-column
        prop="id"
        label="日期"
        width="180">
    </el-table-column>
    <el-table-column
        prop="license"
        label="姓名"
        width="180">
    </el-table-column>
    <el-table-column
        prop="type"
        label="地址">
    </el-table-column>
    <el-table-column
        prop="speed"
        label="地址">
    </el-table-column>
    <el-table-column
        prop="createtime"
        label="地址">
    </el-table-column>
  </el-table>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      tableData: [{
        date: '2016-05-02',
        name: '王小虎',
        address: '上海市普陀区金沙江路 1518 弄'
      }, {
        date: '2016-05-04',
        name: '王小虎',
        address: '上海市普陀区金沙江路 1517 弄'
      }, {
        date: '2016-05-01',
        name: '王小虎',
        address: '上海市普陀区金沙江路 1519 弄'
      }, {
        date: '2016-05-03',
        name: '王小虎',
        address: '上海市普陀区金沙江路 1516 弄'
      }]
    }
  },
  created() {
    this.load()
  },

  methods:{
    load(){
      this.request.get("/car/get",
          {}).then(res=>{
            this.tableData = res.data
      })
    }
  }
}
</script>
